lines.speaker: Owner
lines.content: Hi, I would like to get my golden retriever groomed. He is a bit messy after playing in the park.
lines.cn: 你好，我想给我的金毛美容。他在公园玩完之后有点脏。

lines.speaker: Groomer
lines.content: No problem at all. We can give him a full bath, a haircut, and trim his nails. Does that sound good?
lines.cn: 完全没问题。我们可以给他全身洗澡、剪毛和剪指甲。可以吗？

lines.speaker: Owner
lines.content: Yes, please. Can you also clean his ears? He has been scratching them lately.
lines.cn: 好的，请吧。你还能清理一下他的耳朵吗？他最近一直在挠耳朵。

lines.speaker: Groomer
lines.content: Sure. Ear cleaning is included. We will check if there is any infection too.
lines.cn: 当然。清理耳朵包含在内。我们也会检查是否有感染。

lines.speaker: Owner
lines.content: How long will it take? I can come back to pick him up later.
lines.cn: 需要多久？我可以过会儿再来接他。

lines.speaker: Groomer
lines.content: For a full grooming package, it usually takes about two hours. We will call you when he is ready.
lines.cn: 全套美容通常需要大约两小时。好了我们会打电话通知你。

lines.speaker: Owner
lines.content: What is the total cost? And do you have any special shampoo for sensitive skin?
lines.cn: 总共多少钱？你们有适合敏感皮肤的特殊洗发水吗？

lines.speaker: Groomer
lines.content: The total is sixty dollars. We do have a mild oatmeal shampoo that is great for sensitive skin.
lines.cn: 一共60美元。我们确实有温和的燕麦洗发水，很适合敏感皮肤。

lines.speaker: Owner
lines.content: Perfect, please use that one. He sometimes gets itchy after regular shampoo.
lines.cn: 太好了，请用那个。他有时候用普通洗发水会痒。

lines.speaker: Groomer
lines.content: Noted. We will take good care of him. He looks like a sweet dog. See you in two hours!
lines.cn: 记下了。我们会好好照顾他的。他看起来很温顺。两小时后见！
